calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-25-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/K. Shaw, CSR: Yvonne Lee.

Petitioner: Aldo Jose Teodoro, present in pro per with Spanish Interpreter: Fanny Suarez (Court Certified Interpreter).

Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined. However, in open court, Mr. Teodoro explains that he speaks Portuguese, but is able to understand Spanish. During the proceedings, the Petitioner explains that he does not want to change his name, but have his name added to his daughter's birth certificate. The court informs Mr. Teodoro that it is unable to fullfill this request and directs him to the court Access Center in Room 208 for legal advice. The matter is ordered off calendar.
